_comment: FROZEN scoring rig for the off-target screen (demo-plan.md Step C). These thresholds were committed in src/crossflag/demo/panel.py for the 8-point calibrated demo BEFORE any large screen existed — that is the pre-registration. Applied UNCHANGED to the screen. DO NOT re-tune after seeing screen results.

metrics.PAE_IF: mean predicted aligned error over antibody(H+L) x antigen(V) token pairs, symmetrized, averaged across 5 samples (A). Lower = tighter.
metrics.epitope_reprod: mean pairwise Jaccard of contacted antigen residues (5 A heavy-atom) across 5 samples. Higher = same epitope every sample.
